title: Searchable Select2 Dropdown for Folder, Created By, and Modified By Filters
story: As a DataTools Pro user with many report folders, I want to search and select folders from a type-ahead dropdown, so that I can quickly find the folder I need without scrolling through a long list.
description:
Enhances the folder, Created By, and Modified By dropdown filters on the Reports and Dashboards page with Select2 searchable dropdowns. Folders are sorted alphabetically in the dropdown.

The Select2 library was downloaded locally (rather than loaded from CDN) to enable CSS customization for dark mode compatibility. Custom CSS handles text overflow with ellipsis, dropdown width auto-sizing, and consistent styling with the existing DataTools Pro theme.

The same searchable dropdown pattern was applied to the Created By and Modified By user filters.
acceptance_criteria: Folders are sorted alphabetically in the dropdown
Created By dropdown supports type-ahead search
Modified By dropdown supports type-ahead search
Dropdown text truncates with ellipsis for long names
Dropdown width adjusts automatically with a minimum width of 200px
Select2 library CSS is compatible with dark mode
ux_changes: Replaced standard dropdowns with Select2 searchable dropdowns for Folder, Created By, and Modified By filters. Added text overflow handling with ellipsis and auto-sizing dropdown width.
implementation_notes: Select2 library was downloaded locally to avoid CSS conflicts with the DTP theme. Ryan provided specific CSS overrides for text overflow, dropdown width, and selection container sizing. The library's default color styles were removed and replaced with DTP dark mode compatible styles.
comment_summary: Balaji implemented Select2 dropdowns. Ryan provided CSS fixes for sizing and text overflow. Ryan recommended downloading the library locally to control CSS conflicts with dark mode. Balaji applied Select2 to Created By and Modified By filters as well.
